.bgm-btn:hover{background:var(--hover-metal);} .bgm-btn.play-btn{ width:34px;height:34px;font-size:0.95rem; background:var(--metal-bar);color:#6a2038; border:none;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(212,96,122,0.25); line-height:1;padding:0; } .bgm-btn.play-btn:hover{opacity:0.85;} /* Playlist */ .bgm-playlist{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;max-height:100px;overflow-y:auto;} .bgm-playlist::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;} .bgm-playlist::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(212,96,122,0.25);border-radius:2px;} .pl-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 6px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;border:1px solid transparent;} .pl-item:hover{background:var(--hover-metal);} .pl-item.active{background:rgba(212,96,122,0.1);border-color:rgba(212,96,122,0.22);} .pl-thumb{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(212,96,122,0.1);} .pl-info{flex:1;min-width:0;} .pl-title{font-size:0.63rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .pl-ch{font-size:0.57rem;color:var(--text2);} /* ─── MAIN ─── */ .main{flex:1;padding:34px 30px;overflow-y:auto;} .main-header{margin-bottom:26px;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);} .main-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--rg2);letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:4px;} .main-date{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:0.12em;} /* Widget grid */ .widget-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:18px;} .widget{ background:var(--white);border-radius:14px; border:1px solid var(--border); box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(212,96,122,0.08); overflow:hidden; transition:background .22s; animation:fadeUp .6s ease both; } .widget:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.08s;} .widget:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.16s;} .widget:hover{background:var(--hover-metal);} @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}} .widget-header{ background:var(--metal-bar); padding:8px 16px; display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; } .widget-header-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:#6a2038;text-transform:uppercase;} .w-dots{display:flex;gap:5px;} .w-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.9);} .widget-body{padding:18px 18px 20px;} /* Brand */ .brand-name{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--rg2);line-height:1;margin-bottom:14px;letter-spacing:0.08em;} .tag-item{padding:9px 12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(252,232,239,0.8);border-left:3px solid var(--rg3);font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--rg2);margin-bottom:7px;letter-spacing:0.06em;} /* Calendar */ .cal-month{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--rg2);text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:0.1em;} .cal-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;text-align:center;} .cal-table th{font-size:0.59rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--rg3);padding:3px 2px 7px;letter-spacing:0.1em;} .cal-table td{padding:6px 2px;font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(61,26,36,0.75);cursor:default;border-radius:50%;transition:color .15s;} .cal-table td:hover:not(:empty){color:var(--rg2);} .cal-today{background:var(--rg)!important;color:white!important;border-radius:50%!important;font-weight:700!important;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(212,96,122,0.4);-webkit-text-fill-color:white!important;} /* D-Day */ .dday-wrap{text-align:center;} .dday-label{font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.3em;color:var(--rg3);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;} .dday-num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:3.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--rg2);line-height:1;margin-bottom:5px;} .dday-since{font-size:0.6rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:0.2em;} /* Now bar */ .now-bar{ position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:28px; background:var(--metal-bar);color:#6a2038; padding:10px 22px;border-radius:50px; display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px; box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(212,96,122,0.3); font-size:0.76rem;font-weight:700;z-index:100; transform:translateY(120px);transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(0.175,.885,.32,1.275); max-width:300px; } .now-bar.visible{transform:translateY(0);} .now-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#6a2038;flex-shrink:0;animation:pulse 1.3s ease infinite;} @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.4}} .now-title{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;} ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(212,96,122,0.25);border-radius:4px;}
